'''ân-r-r''' ('''kanarar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waggon|waggon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waggon|waggon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-r-r
|-
! Lemma
| kanarar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinarar|thinarar]] || [[word:jinarar|jinarar]] || [[word:shinarar|shinarar]] || [[word:kinarar|kinarar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunarar|thuthunarar]] || [[word:jujunarar|jujunarar]] || [[word:shushunarar|shushunarar]] || [[word:kukunarar|kukunarar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunarar|thunarar]] || [[word:junarar|junarar]] || [[word:shunarar|shunarar]] || [[word:kunarar|kunarar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunarar|thunarar]] || [[word:junarar|junarar]] || [[word:shunarar|shunarar]] || [[word:kunarar|kunarar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenarar|thenarar]] || [[word:jenarar|jenarar]] || [[word:shenarar|shenarar]] || [[word:kenarar|kenarar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonarar|thothonarar]] || [[word:jojonarar|jojonarar]] || [[word:shoshonarar|shoshonarar]] || [[word:kokonarar|kokonarar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonarar|thonarar]] || [[word:jonarar|jonarar]] || [[word:shonarar|shonarar]] || [[word:konarar|konarar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonarar|thonarar]] || [[word:jonarar|jonarar]] || [[word:shonarar|shonarar]] || [[word:konarar|konarar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚnarar|thĂŚnarar]] || [[word:jĂŚnarar|jĂŚnarar]] || [[word:shĂŚnarar|shĂŚnarar]] || [[word:kĂŚnarar|kĂŚnarar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanarar|thathanarar]] || [[word:jajanarar|jajanarar]] || [[word:shashanarar|shashanarar]] || [[word:kakanarar|kakanarar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanarar|thanarar]] || [[word:janarar|janarar]] || [[word:shanarar|shanarar]] || [[word:kanarar|kanarar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanarar|thanarar]] || [[word:janarar|janarar]] || [[word:shanarar|shanarar]] || [[word:kanarar|kanarar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanarar|shanarar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanarar|goshanarar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanarar|gokishanarar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanararnĂź|shanararnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanararnknĂź|goshanararnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanararnĂź|gokishanararnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanararshĂŤ|shanararshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanararnkshĂŤ|goshanararnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanararshĂŤ|gokishanararshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanararo|shanararo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanararnkro|goshanararnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanararo|gokishanararo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanararmu|shanararmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanararnkmu|goshanararnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanararmu|gokishanararmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanararsher|shanararsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanararnksher|goshanararnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanararsher|gokishanararsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanararng|shanararng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanararnkng|goshanararnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanararng|gokishanararng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanararya|shanararya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanararnkya|goshanararnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanararya|gokishanararya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanararyam|shanararyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanararnkyam|goshanararnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanararyam|gokishanararyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanararnĂźshĂŤ|shanararnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanararnknĂźshĂŤ|goshanararnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanararnĂźshĂŤ|gokishanararnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanararnĂźro|shanararnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanararnknĂźro|goshanararnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanararnĂźro|gokishanararnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanararnĂźmu|shanararnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanararnknĂźmu|goshanararnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanararnĂźmu|gokishanararnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanararshĂŤnĂź|shanararshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanararnkshĂŤnĂź|goshanararnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanararshĂŤnĂź|gokishanararshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanararshĂŤro|shanararshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanararnkshĂŤro|goshanararnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanararshĂŤro|gokishanararshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanararshĂŤmu|shanararshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanararnkshĂŤmu|goshanararnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanararshĂŤmu|gokishanararshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanararonĂź|shanararonĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanararnkronĂź|goshanararnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanararonĂź|gokishanararonĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanararoshĂŤ|shanararoshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanararnkroshĂŤ|goshanararnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanararoshĂŤ|gokishanararoshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanararomu|shanararomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanararnkromu|goshanararnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanararomu|gokishanararomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanararmunĂź|shanararmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanararnkmunĂź|goshanararnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanararmunĂź|gokishanararmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanararmushĂŤ|shanararmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanararnkmushĂŤ|goshanararnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanararmushĂŤ|gokishanararmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanararmuro|shanararmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanararnkmuro|goshanararnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanararmuro|gokishanararmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
